dataSourceInstructions:
This lakehouse contains 13 Delta tables in a provider-focused healthcare analytics star schema (Gold layer). This data source does NOT contain dim_payer, agg_days_in_ar, or agg_appeal_outcomes.

QUICK REFERENCE:
- "readmission risk score/category" -> fact_encounter
- "readmission rate/trend" -> agg_readmission_by_date
- "denial rate/reasons" -> fact_claim (NO payer breakdown available)
- "adherence/PDC" -> agg_medication_adherence
- "prescription cost/refill" -> fact_prescription
- "diagnosis/ICD/chronic" -> fact_diagnosis JOIN dim_diagnosis
- "patient details" -> dim_patient WHERE is_current = 1
- "provider/RVU/productivity" -> dim_provider WHERE is_current = 1
- "SDOH/vulnerability" -> dim_sdoh JOIN dim_patient ON zip_code
- "DRG/revenue by DRG" -> agg_revenue_by_drg

TABLE SCHEMAS:

fact_encounter: encounter_key (PK), encounter_id, patient_key (FK), provider_key (FK), encounter_date_key (FK), discharge_date_key (FK), facility_key, encounter_type (Inpatient|Outpatient|Emergency|Observation|Telehealth), admission_type, discharge_disposition, length_of_stay (INT days), total_charges (FLOAT $), total_cost (FLOAT $), readmission_flag (INT 0/1), readmission_risk_score (FLOAT 0.0-1.0), readmission_risk_category (High|Medium|Low), drg_code, drg_description, drg_weight (FLOAT), expected_reimbursement (FLOAT $)

fact_claim: claim_key (PK), claim_id, patient_key (FK), provider_key (FK), encounter_key (FK), claim_date_key (FK), facility_key, claim_type, claim_status (Approved|Denied|Pending), denial_flag (INT 0/1), denial_risk_score (FLOAT), denial_risk_category (High|Medium|Low), primary_denial_reason, recommended_action, billed_amount (FLOAT $), allowed_amount (FLOAT $), paid_amount (FLOAT $). NOTE: No payer_key -- cannot do payer-level breakdowns.

fact_prescription: prescription_key (PK), prescription_id, patient_key (FK), provider_key (FK), medication_key (FK), encounter_key (FK), fill_date_key (FK), facility_key, fill_number (INT), days_supply (INT), quantity_dispensed (INT), refills_authorized (INT), is_generic (INT 0/1), is_chronic_medication (INT 0/1), total_cost (FLOAT $), pharmacy_type

fact_diagnosis: fact_diagnosis_key (PK), diagnosis_id, encounter_key (FK), diagnosis_date_key (FK), patient_key (FK), diagnosis_key (FK), facility_key, icd_code, diagnosis_sequence (INT), diagnosis_type (principal|secondary), present_on_admission (Y/N/U)

dim_patient: patient_key (PK), patient_id, first_name, last_name, date_of_birth, age (INT), age_group, gender, city, state, zip_code, insurance_type, insurance_provider, is_current (INT 0|1 -- ALWAYS FILTER = 1)

dim_provider: provider_key (PK), provider_id, first_name, last_name, display_name, specialty, department, npi_number, facility_id, is_active (INT 0/1), contract_type (FFS|Value-Based|Capitated), fte_status (Full-time|Part-time|Per-diem), years_experience (INT), board_certified (BOOLEAN 0/1), patient_panel_size (INT), annual_rvu_target (INT), actual_rvu (INT), patient_satisfaction_score (FLOAT 1.0-5.0), telehealth_enabled (BOOLEAN 0/1), documentation_score (INT 0-100), ehr_adoption_score (INT 0-100), is_current (INT 0|1 -- ALWAYS FILTER = 1)

dim_diagnosis: diagnosis_key (PK), icd_code, icd_description, icd_category, is_chronic (INT 0/1)

dim_medication: medication_key (PK), rxnorm_code, medication_name, generic_name, drug_class, therapeutic_area, route, form, strength, is_chronic (INT 0/1), is_active (INT 0/1)

dim_sdoh: sdoh_key (PK), zip_code (join via dim_patient.zip_code), state, risk_tier (High|Medium|Low), poverty_rate (FLOAT), food_desert_flag (INT 0/1), transportation_score (FLOAT), housing_instability_rate (FLOAT), uninsured_rate (FLOAT), broadband_access_pct (FLOAT), median_household_income (INT), population (INT), social_vulnerability_index (FLOAT)

dim_date: date_key (PK INT YYYYMMDD), full_date, year, quarter, month_number, month_name, day_of_month, day_of_week, day_name, is_weekend, is_holiday, fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter

agg_readmission_by_date: encounter_date_key (FK->dim_date), encounter_type, total_encounters, actual_readmissions, high_risk_count, medium_risk_count, low_risk_count, avg_risk_score, total_charges, avg_length_of_stay

agg_medication_adherence: patient_key (FK), medication_key (FK), drug_class, therapeutic_area, measurement_period_start, measurement_period_end, total_fills, total_days_supply, days_in_period, covered_days, pdc_score (FLOAT 0.0-1.0), adherence_category (Adherent|Partial|Non-Adherent), total_medication_cost, total_payer_cost, total_patient_cost, gap_days, is_chronic (INT 0/1)

agg_revenue_by_drg: drg_code, drg_description, encounter_count (INT), avg_charges (FLOAT), avg_cost_to_deliver (FLOAT), avg_expected_reimbursement (FLOAT), margin_per_case (FLOAT), margin_pct (FLOAT)

SQL RULES:
1. ALWAYS filter is_current = 1 on dim_patient and dim_provider.
2. Join dimensions on surrogate keys EXCEPT dim_sdoh which joins on zip_code.
3. Boolean columns use = 1 for TRUE.
4. Use NULLIF(denominator, 0) in all rate calculations.
5. Use CAST(... AS FLOAT) to avoid integer division.
6. NEVER AVG pre-computed rate columns.
7. agg_ tables have NO provider_key -- use fact tables for provider analysis.
8. Default TOP 20 for unbounded results.
9. No payer_key in this model -- cannot do payer-level analysis.
10. NEVER add date filters unless user specifies a time period.

ADHERENCE: pdc_score >= 0.80 Adherent, 0.50-0.80 Partial, < 0.50 Non-Adherent
RISK: score >= 0.70 High, 0.30-0.70 Medium, < 0.30 Low
userDescription: Gold-layer lakehouse with 13 curated provider-focused healthcare tables. Contains clinical encounters, claims (without payer attribution), prescriptions, diagnoses, medication adherence, SDOH, provider productivity, and DRG revenue data.
